required_fixes.summary: Selected district inspector is not fully localized in player mode.
required_fixes.details: In zh-CN, the selected District 1 inspector can show English/raw tokens such as Road, road, Garrison, continuous, and 12 days from DistrictTraitList, DistrictEffectList, and formatPlayerRouteSummary.
required_fixes.required_action: Add i18n formatting for district route kinds, obligation kinds, due labels/time units, and route-effect travel-day summaries; use those helpers for all selected-inspector player text.

required_fixes.summary: Tests do not catch the zh-CN inspector token leak.
required_fixes.details: Existing focused UI/E2E tests pass while player-visible English/raw tokens remain possible.
required_fixes.required_action: Add focused UI and/or Playwright zh-CN assertions that the selected district inspector uses localized route kind/unit/due text and does not contain Road, road, Garrison, continuous, or days in player mode.
